name: Symonds Yat East & King Arthur's Cave
highlights: Quieter alternative to Symonds Yat Rock, via prehistoric cave site.
points_of_interest: King Arthur's Cave (Palaeolithic); Great Doward Iron Age camp; Seven Sisters Rocks; Biblins suspension bridge
viewpoints: Symonds Yat Rock; River Wye meander
parking_start: The Doward / Biblins forestry car park
food_drink_nearby: Saracens Head Symonds Yat (hand-ferry crossing); Forest View Cafe
hazards_notes: Caves muddy; steep descents; torch useful
